word: G3626 - οἰκουρός - oikourós - oy-koo-ros' - Keeper at home

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Keeper at home
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
caring for the house, working at home
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3624 and οὖρος ouros (a guard; be “ware”); a stayer at home, that is, domestically inclined (a “good housekeeper”): - keeper at home.
